tiers_explained.Raw LLM: LLM answers directly from training knowledge. No tools.
tiers_explained.Raw MCP: LLM has 60+ MCP tools available. Must figure out which to call, with what parameters, by itself. No guidance.
tiers_explained.Harness MCP: LLM receives the Harness system prompt with ToolRouter's recommended tool sequence. LLM still must execute the calls and interpret results correctly.

qwen3-8b.note: Harness fixes tool selection errors (~43pp gain). Remaining 15% gap: LLM misreads structured engine output.

qwen3-32b.note: Similar to qwen-8b. Size increase doesn't help tool execution.

DeepSeek-V3.2.note: Already strong. Harness adds correctness guard and catches the occasional tool selection mistake.

bottleneck_analysis.tool_selection: 58% of small-model failures. Harness eliminates this entirely.
bottleneck_analysis.parameter_formatting: 15% of failures. Harness provides parameter templates, reducing this.
bottleneck_analysis.output_parsing: 8% of failures. Harness cannot fix this — LLM reads {x:3,y:1} as x=1,y=3.
bottleneck_analysis.engine_computation: 0% of failures. SymPy is deterministic and correct.
